questionHtml: Estimate, in °C, the temperature of the roof tiles.
markschemeHtml:
absorbed intensity = (1 − 0.2) × 680 «= 544» «W m−2» OR emitted intensity = 0.97 × 5.67 × 10−8 × T4 ✓

T =5440.97×5.67×10-84=315 «K» ✓

42 «°C» ✓

 

Allow ECF from MP1 and MP2.

Allow MP1 if absorbed or emitted intensity is multiplied by area.

meta.title: Estimate, in °C, the temperature of the roof tiles.
